name: Mini Corn Dogs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the egg, milk, and 2 tablespoons of corn oil.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry mixture, stirring until well combined.
4. Heat the peanut oil in a deep pot or Dutch oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit (190°C).
5. Dip each wiener in the batter, allowing excess to drip off.
6. Carefully add the battered wieners to the hot oil in small batches.
7. Fry for 1-1/2 to 2 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Remove the corn dogs from the oil using a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
9. Serve warm with prepared mustard on the side.
